title: NoteSaveFailed.reason mapping from SaveError is unspecified
description: REQ-EPNS-004 states NoteSaveFailed is emitted with 'reason' and 'occurredOn' on save failure. The type contract (shared/events.ts lines 60-66) defines NoteSaveFailed.reason as NoteSaveFailureReason, which is a flat string union: 'permission' | 'disk-full' | 'lock' | 'unknown'. However, SaveError (shared/errors.ts lines 38-44) is a discriminated union with kind 'validation' (carrying SaveValidationError) or kind 'fs' (carrying FsError). The spec does not define how to map from SaveError to NoteSaveFailureReason. For example, SaveError { kind: 'validation', reason: { kind: 'empty-body-on-idle' } } has no obvious mapping to the four NoteSaveFailureReason strings. Similarly, FsError { kind: 'not-found' } has no corresponding NoteSaveFailureReason value.
recommendation: Add an explicit mapping table from SaveError variants to NoteSaveFailureReason in the behavioral spec, or acknowledge that NoteSaveFailed emission is the responsibility of the CaptureAutoSave sub-workflow (out of scope) and remove it from this spec's event emission list. If the latter, clarify that flushCurrentSession does NOT directly emit NoteSaveFailed.
